description: Unit: parseBinding('mod+s') → mods{mod} + token{kind:code,value:KeyS}
Unit: parseBinding('alt+n') → mods{alt} + token{kind:code,value:KeyN}
Unit: parseBinding('?') → mods{} + token{kind:char,value:'?'}
Unit: parseBinding('[') / ']' → BracketLeft/BracketRight code-kind
Unit: parseBinding for Enter/Escape/Tab/Space/Arrow*/Delete/Backspace/Home/End/PageUp/PageDown → code-kind named keys
Unit: parseBinding for digits and F1..F12 → Digit*/F* code-kind
Unit: literal ctrl+s and meta+s parse distinctly from mod+s and are flagged not-remapped
Unit: modifier order normalizes deterministically; printable keys lowercased
Unit: invalid syntax (e.g. 'mod+', 'foo+bar', '') returns typed error result
Unit: parseSequence('g t') → ordered [chord g, chord t]; 'g t c' → 3 chords
Unit: parseSequence rejects a sequence element with bad chord syntax

Static/boundary: no file under packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts imports @alga-psa/user-composition or any feature package (@alga-psa/tickets|billing|assets|projects|clients|scheduling|...); engine resolves persistence only through the ShortcutStorage interface

`npx nx graph` shows NO new circular dependency vs .github/known-cycles.json after the keyboard-shortcuts engine + MSP-wrapper injection are added (no @alga-psa/ui -> @alga-psa/user-composition -> @alga-psa/ui edge)
Component: provider uses an injected ShortcutStorage when given; falls back to the in-memory default when none injected (inversion seam works without user-composition)
Unit: matchEvent resolves mod→Meta on mac platform, →Ctrl on other
Unit: code-kind requires exact modifier-set equality (mod+s does not match mod+shift+s)
Unit: char-kind '?' matches event.key='?' regardless of which physical key/modifiers produced it
Unit: macOS Option+N (event.key='Dead'/'˜', event.code='KeyN', altKey) matches binding 'alt+n'
Unit: international layout — mod+s matches when physical S yields event.key='ы'/'s' but event.code='KeyS'
Unit: AltGr (ctrlKey&&altKey producing a char) does not false-match a 'mod+<char>' binding
Unit: platform detection returns a value only post-mount; SSR render path does not call navigator
Unit: registry add/remove keeps a single source of truth keyed by id
Component: provider installs exactly one document keydown listener (capture); none added per-hook
Component: useShortcutAction registers on mount and unregisters on unmount (no leak, no fire after unmount)
Unit: single-array defaultBindings sugar expands to {mac,other}; per-platform map respected
Component: disabled action does not fire and does not preventDefault (browser default preserved)
Component: preventDefault fires only when an enabled action actually handles the event
Component: useShortcutScope ref-counts (two consumers; scope stays active until last unmounts)
Component: active scopes cleared on route change (stale scope does not leak)
Unit/Component: dispatch skips when event.defaultPrevented (no double-fire vs a component that already handled the key)
Unit: dispatch filters matched actions to active scopes only
Unit: highest priority wins; equal priority → most-local active scope (top of stack)
Unit: residual tie reported as conflict; NOT resolved by registration order
Component: shortcut suppressed in input/textarea/select/contenteditable/role=textbox/role=combobox/editor root
Component: allowInEditable:true action fires inside an editable target
Component: selection.* / single-letter page action fires only when an active region is registered, not on a focused button
Component: sequence 'g t' resolves and invokes the action
Component: sequence buffer times out after the configured interval; late second key does not trigger
Component: buffer resets on a non-matching key, scope change, and route change
Component: sequences suppressed while typing in an editable target
Component: single-chord action and a sequence starting with the same first key coexist correctly
Component: while a Radix modal owns Escape, the system does NOT add a competing global Escape listener
Component: nested Radix dialog Escape closes only the top modal once (no double-fire)
Component: panel.close via Escape closes the drawer and integrates with Radix onEscapeKeyDown
Unit: editor.redo default = mac:mod+shift+z, other:ctrl+y (and ctrl+shift+z) — resolves per platform
Unit: action ID catalog has per-platform defaults for every catalogued action
Component: provider mounted in MspLayoutClient wraps DefaultLayout and AlgaDeskMspShell
Component/E2E: provider absent on auth/client-portal screens (no global shortcuts there)
E2E (Playwright): mod+k focuses global search; SearchPalette no longer has its own window listener
E2E: mod+l toggles AI chat; behavior identical to pre-migration incl. open→focus and aiAssistantAvailable gating
E2E: mod+ArrowUp triggers quick-ask / focuses chat input as before; gated when AI unavailable
Regression: when aiAssistantAvailable=false, mod+l/mod+ArrowUp do nothing and do not preventDefault
E2E: `?` opens the read-only help dialog
E2E: `c` opens QuickCreateDialog in a non-editable active region; does nothing while typing
E2E: on the assets page, the assets command palette opens via its new non-mod+k default (page scope)
Regression: mod+k now ONLY opens global search everywhere, including the assets page (conflict removed)
E2E: Escape closes an open drawer (panel.close), Radix-integrated
E2E: drawer.historyBack/Forward navigate drawer history as before
Regression: both DrawerContext files behave identically post-migration; no duplicate handling
Component: drawer/panel scope pushed on open, popped (ref-counted) on close
E2E: [ and ] move to previous/next record in a detail drawer
Cross-platform: [ / ] record nav works on Windows without triggering browser navigation; Alt+Arrow available only if user opts in
Regression: ticket adjacent-record navigation behavior preserved after migration (now [ / ]); TicketNavigation window listener removed
E2E: with a detail drawer open over a ticket list, [ / ] navigate records (panel scope) not list rows (page scope)
Component: editor scope pushed by invoice/workflow designer and rich-text roots (ref-counted)
Regression: invoice designer undo/redo/delete/escape/arrow-move behave as before, now editor-scoped
Cross-platform: editor.redo = ⇧⌘Z on mac, Ctrl+Y on Windows; both invoke redo
Regression: workflow designer keyboard actions preserved post-migration
Component: BlockNote internal undo/redo still works and is not double-handled by the system
Component: overrides persist via useUserPreference (localStorage immediate, debounced server sync) under keyboard_shortcuts_v1
Unit: persisted blob contains only deltas in neutral syntax (no resolved cmd+/ctrl+, no untouched defaults)
Unit: resolution = userOverride ?? platformDefault(platform)
Unit: a user value equal to current platform default is dropped from storage (not frozen)
Cross-device: Mac-stored {global.search:[mod+j]} resolves to Ctrl+J under Windows platform with no migration
Cross-device: never-customized editor.redo serves Ctrl+Y on Windows even though Mac session showed ⇧⌘Z (default not persisted)
Cross-device: Mac-set record.next=alt+ArrowRight loads under Windows with a non-blocking advisory, not silently rewritten
Unit: on-load validation flags reserved/hostile combos per current platform
Unit: blob version migration function upgrades an older shape without data loss
Component: disabled[] action never fires in dispatch
Component: unauthenticated user gets localStorage-only persistence (skipServerFetch path)
Component: Keyboard Shortcuts tab appears in Settings with the right id/label/icon and Card chrome
Component: settings list groups actions by group; shows label, description, scope, default, effective binding resolved for device
Component: rebind capture records event.code for a letter binding and event.key for a '?' binding (matches matcher classification)
E2E: rebinding global.search in settings changes the effective shortcut immediately
Component: clear custom binding reverts the action to its platform default
Component: disable toggle writes disabled[] and the action stops firing
Component: reset-one restores a single action default
Component: reset-all is gated by ConfirmationDialog and restores all defaults
Component: assigning a combo already used in the same scope shows an inline conflict and requires explicit replace confirm
Component: conflict detection is platform-aware (Alt+Arrow flagged on Windows, not Mac)
Component: success uses react-hot-toast and failure uses handleError(error,t(...)) — consistent with other settings panels
Component: LoadingIndicator shown while preferences load; no explicit Save button (debounced auto-save)
Lint/Component: every interactive element has an id; Button variants match app conventions
Visual consistency: panel structure matches ExperimentalFeaturesSettings/GeneralSettings (Card+Table+Switch+ghost-reset)
Component: settingsProductTabs allowlist unaffected; tab visible for MSP users
E2E: help dialog is read-only, lists only active shortcuts, grouped by group/scope
Component: disabled/unavailable actions are hidden from help
Component: custom (non-default) bindings flagged in help
Component: help renders bindings resolved per device (⌘K mac / Ctrl+K Windows) with no hydration mismatch
Component: <Kbd> renders mac glyphs (⌘⌥⇧⌃) and other-platform text (Ctrl/Alt/Shift) post-mount
Component: curated controls show a visible kbd hint matching the effective binding; hint updates after a rebind
Unit: aria-keyshortcuts mapping converts internal binding to valid ARIA value format (mod resolved)
A11y: instrumented controls expose aria-keyshortcuts; screen-reader value is correct for the platform
i18n: every registered action has a labelKey and groupKey present in en/msp/keyboard-shortcuts.json (no raw strings)
i18n: settings-tab label key present in en/msp/settings.json and used (not hardcoded)
i18n: msp/keyboard-shortcuts registered in ROUTE_NAMESPACES and preloads on /msp routes
i18n: fr/es/de/nl/it/pl/pt files exist with full key parity to en for the new namespace + tab key
i18n: pseudo-locales xx/yy regenerated and include all new keys
i18n: node scripts/validate-translations.cjs passes (key parity, no extras, valid {{vars}}, valid JSON) for new keys across all locales
i18n QA: switching locale to xx shows pseudo for all shortcuts/settings/help strings (no untranslated literals)
i18n: platform glyph labels and aria text contain no hardcoded English; localized/locale-safe
i18n: cross-device hostile-combo advisory message is internationalized and interpolates the action/combo
i18n: help dialog and settings panel render correctly under a non-English locale (de) without layout breakage
Regression suite: AI/search/drawer/ticket/designer shortcuts all still work after full migration
Regression: component-local widget handlers (DatePicker, SearchableSelect, TagInput, comboboxes, Radix internals) unchanged; their keys not stolen
Build/SSR: no hydration warnings; engine modules are client-only
Migration discipline: a legacy handler is removed only after its replacement action passes regression (verified per phase)
Perf: single keydown dispatch does no measurable input latency with the full action catalog registered
